summary: The right rewrite turns vague optimism into a sharper operating update with an explicit next move.
strengths_left: Mentions customer conversations, onboarding, and pricing
strengths_right: Surfaces a specific tension in the funnel
risks_right: The supporting evidence is still compact rather than fully detailed
trace_notes_left: No trace sidecar is provided for the left baseline.
trace_notes_right: Right candidate includes a complete trace with diagnosis and next-move planning.
The trace explains why the rewrite shifts from optimism to observed tension.
cognitive_notes_left: Left candidate has no cognitive baseline or module-level process record.
cognitive_notes_right: Right candidate includes a full CW artifact with baseline displacement and module sequencing.
The process makes the shift from polished update to decision-focused update inspectable.
